## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] New Stata template
- [ ] Existing template clarification
- [ ] Repository maintenance
- [ ] Validation / CI

## Template checklist

- [ ] This PR has one clear purpose.
- [ ] New Stata code blocks use the `stata` language tag.
- [ ] Placeholder variables are documented or easy to replace.
- [ ] Required community-contributed commands are noted.
- [ ] No private file paths or sensitive data are introduced.
- [ ] Existing template behavior is preserved, or the behavior change is explained.

## Verification

- [ ] I reviewed the rendered Markdown.
- [ ] I checked links and file paths added by this PR.
- [ ] I ran any available repository checks.
